translations.en: "Well, $P, do you need @help with something? Or maybe you've got time for a @story, eh?"
translations.zh: 「嗯，$P，可有事需在下相@助？又或閣下尚有閒暇聽一則@故事？」

translations.en: "Iolo's the only name I remember having." (He pronounces his name 'Yo-low.')
translations.zh: 「在下記憶所及，唯『尤洛』一名而已。」（他將名字唸作『Yo-low』。）

translations.en: "If you want me to @gather all our gold together so you can carry it, just say so."
translations.zh: 「若閣下欲令在下@匯集眾人之金幣交由閣下攜帶，但說無妨。」

translations.en: "Or I could @split it up evenly, if you prefer."
translations.zh: 「或者在下可將之@均分眾人，悉聽尊便。」

translations.en: "My hut is in the Deep Forest, south of Yew."
translations.zh: 「在下茅舍位於尤伊城南之深林中。」

translations.en: "I've been a crossbow maker for so long, I've gotten weary of it."
translations.zh: 「在下製作弩弓已有年矣，如今已感倦怠。」

translations.en: *"Hopefully, now that my @apprentice has taken over the shop, I'll be able to spend more time as a @bard."
translations.zh: *「所幸今有@學徒接掌店鋪，在下便可多花時光做一名@吟遊詩人。」

translations.en: "My shop still sells the finest crossbows in the land."
translations.zh: 「在下店中所售，仍為全境最精良之弩弓。」

translations.en: "I've done a lot over the years to refine the design, and I trained my apprentice well."
translations.zh: 「多年以來在下不斷精進其設計，亦悉心調教學徒。」

translations.en: "I'm sure she'll carry on the tradition in fine fashion."
translations.zh: 「在下深信她必能將此技藝傳承得當。」

translations.en: "Yes, it's always been a hobby of mine."
"Have you heard the piece 'Stones' that I composed some years ago?"
translations.zh: 「閣下可曾聽過在下多年前所譜之曲『石』？」

translations.en: "She's had more time to develop her musical talents than I all these years."
translations.zh: 「這些年來，她比在下有更多時間鑽研樂藝。」

translations.en: "But after this @quest I hope to join her in @Minoc and enter the artisan's @guild."
translations.zh: 「然此次@試煉之後，在下盼能赴@米諾克與她相聚，加入工匠@公會。」

translations.en: "There always seems to be a quest when you come to visit us, doesn't there?"
translations.zh: 「閣下每來造訪，似乎總有一場試煉相伴，不是麼？」

translations.en: "Some time you should just drop by for @tea."
translations.zh: 「來日閣下也該單純前來品@茶一回。」
「也罷，那就來杯弗雷澤之@愚醇吧。」

translations.en: "A drink worthy enough to greet an old friend."
"Not as big as @Britain, but it's a peaceful town."
translations.zh: 「不如@不列顛城那般雄偉，卻是個寧靜之鎮。」

translations.en: "Though there is still need for the instruments of war, as I grow in years I would now take up those of peace."
translations.zh: 「兵戎之器固仍有所需，然年歲漸長，在下如今更願執持和平之器。」
translations.note: 對仗『兵戎之器』vs『和平之器』

translations.en: "Remember, he doesn't like people to call him that..."
translations.zh: 「記得，他可不愛旁人這般稱呼……」

translations.en: "I've been with you since we saved you from those @gargoyles, haven't I?"
translations.zh: 「自吾等將閣下自@魔像族手中救出，在下便一路相隨，不是麼？」

translations.en: "They're pretty ugly looking, if you ask me..."
translations.zh: 「依在下看來，那些傢伙著實醜陋……」

translations.en: "His nibs, the king, told me I should stay with you constantly."
translations.zh: 「那位大人——也就是國王——交代在下須時刻相隨閣下。」

translations.en: "I'll make an exception when you have to relieve yourself, of course."
translations.zh: 「當然啦，閣下要更衣方便之時，在下會破例迴避。」

translations.en: "My favorite one is about the time I had to wake Dupre up for a tournament...
translations.zh: 「在下最愛講的，是某次比武大會前喚醒杜普雷的那段往事……

translations.en: "Iolo! You promised NEVER to tell anyone about that!"
translations.zh: 「尤洛！你發誓過此事絕不外傳的！」

translations.en: "Yes, you're right. I'm sorry." He whispers to you, "Ask me later when he's not around..."
translations.zh: 「是的，你說得對，抱歉。」他低聲對閣下道：「待他不在時再來問在下……」

translations.en: "But maybe I shouldn't tell you about that. After all, I did promise..."
translations.zh: 「不過此事或許還是不該告訴閣下，畢竟在下確實許下了承諾……」

translations.en: "I've still got to tell you that story about Dupre sometime..."
translations.zh: 「終有一日，在下還是要把杜普雷那段故事說與閣下聽……」

riddles_additions.en: Where Mr. Nose hangs out. / His nibs, the king.
riddles_additions.zh: @大鼻先生常駐之地。／那位大人——也就是國王。
riddles_additions.ref: Iolo 對 Lord British 的暱稱／戲稱
riddles_additions.strategy: Mr. Nose 直譯『大鼻先生』；His nibs 譯『那位大人』

riddles_additions.en: spam / humbug → Ask Shamino about that.
riddles_additions.zh: 罐肉／騙術 →「此事去問夏米諾吧。」
riddles_additions.ref: spam=Monty Python; humbug=Dickens 《Christmas Carol》Scrooge 口頭禪
riddles_additions.strategy: 保留兩個關鍵字觸發詞與重定向句

riddles_additions.en: 'Stones' - a piece I composed some years ago
riddles_additions.zh: 在下多年前所譜之曲『石』
riddles_additions.ref: Ultima 系列彩蛋：Iolo 與 Gwenno 真實創作

translator_notes: Iolo 用『在下』自稱、稱玩家『閣下』。len=3 三例 (job/tea/bye) 受 byte 限制改單字。所有 62 條 ≤ 原文 len。batch 1/2。
